title: ACI 318-19 Reinforcement Development & Lap Length
description: Calculate reinforcement development and lap length as per ACI 318-19.

f_c.description: Specified Compressive Strength. Symbol: f'_c. Units: ksi

d_agg.description: Maximum Aggregate Size. Symbol: d_{agg}. Units: in

casting_height.description: Casting Height. Symbol: h_c. Units: in. The vertical distance from the bottom of the concrete formwork to the position where the reinforcing bars are placed.

cover.description: Clear Cover. Symbol: c_c. Units: in. The distance between the outer surface of the concrete and the nearest surface of the reinforcing steel bars.

f_y.description: Specified Yield Strength. Symbol: f_{y}. Units: ksi

s.description: Main Bar Spacing (center-to-center). Symbol: s. Units: in

n_legs.description: Number Of Transverse Bars Legs. Symbol: legs. Number of legs withing the spacing s of the main reinforcement crossing the potential splitting plane.

n.description: Number of Bars along Splitting Plane. Symbol: n. Number of bars being developed across the plane of splitting.

n_h.description: Number of Hooks. Symbol: n_h. Number of hooks being developed inside the confining reinforcement.

s_t.description: Closed Ties Bar Spacing (center-to-center). Symbol: s_{t}. Units: in. Used in the definition of the confinement reinforcement for the compression development length.

n_t.description: Number of Ties within the Confinement Zone. Symbol: n_t. Number of ties within the confinement zone.

splice_s.description: Splice Spacing. Symbol: splice_s. Units: in. The minimum distance between adjacent splices.

reinf_factor.description: Reinforcement Factor. Symbol: \frac{A_{s,req}}{A_{s,prov}}. Ratio between the provided reinforcement area and the required one. See 25.4.10.

special_moment_frame_flag.description: Joint of Special Moment Frame. Symbol: SMF. Development length and splices for Special Moment Frame joints.

set_ktr_equal_to_zero_flag.description: Set Ktr Factor Equal to Zero?. Symbol: Ktr0. It is permitted to conservatively use Ktr = 0 when transverse reinforcement is present.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
